name: Brookfield Property Partners L.P. 6.25% Class A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Units Series 1
summary: Brookfield Property Partners L.P. 6.25% Class A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Units Series 1 represents preferred equity in Brookfield Property Partners, a global real estate company. These units offer a fixed dividend rate and have specific redemption features as outlined in the security's documentation. Brookfield Property Partners invests in and manages a diverse portfolio of real estate assets.
